product_highlights: Broad-spectrum applications in skincare and scalp care
Collagen synthesis, inflammation reduction, wound healing support
notes: Polar Peptides is a Canadian specialist supplier focusing on GHK-Cu (Copper Tripeptide-1) and related carrier peptides for cosmetic applications. Their GHK-Cu offering is targeted at skincare and scalp care formulations, supporting collagen synthesis, inflammation reduction, and wound healing. As a specialist supplier, Polar Peptides provides high-purity copper peptides with Certificate of Analysis for cosmetic manufacturers.
